probes.name: invoice-schema-migrations-applied
probes.description: Confirms every migration this module ships has run: invoices, invoice_lines, credit_notes, plus their indexes (composite unique per-tenant-per-year on invoice_number + credit_note_number; issue_date DESC for aging queries).

probes.name: invoice-sequential-numbering-index-present
probes.description: Confirms the composite unique partial indexes on (tenant_id, invoice_number) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND (tenant_id, credit_note_number) exist. Missing these makes sequential numbering unenforceable + permits duplicate numbers under concurrent writes.

probes.name: invoice-postgres-advisory-lock-available
probes.description: Confirms pg_advisory_xact_lock is available (Postgres-only). The number generator relies on advisory locks for gap-free sequential numbering under concurrent writes. Fails hard on non-Postgres DBs.

probes.name: invoice-pdf-storage-writable
probes.description: Confirms the configured PDF storage disk (config('invoice.pdf.storage_disk')) is writable with SSE-KMS encryption enabled. Tests by uploading + deleting a small test file.

probes.name: invoice-pdf-renderer-registered
probes.description: Confirms at least one #[AsInvoicePdfRenderer] driver is registered (DomPDF at minimum). Enterprise deployments with custom renderers verify each is discoverable.

probes.name: invoice-draft-backlog
probes.description: Warns when > 500 invoices are in status='draft' for > 24h across all tenants. Indicates FinalizeInvoiceJob has stalled or tax-computation is backing up.

probes.name: invoice-stale-drafts
probes.description: Warns when > 1000 invoices are in status='draft' AND created_at < now() - interval '90 days'. Indicates abandoned workflows that need cleanup.

probes.name: invoice-past-due-count
probes.description: Reports the current count of past_due invoices per tenant_tier. Non-zero is normal; sudden spikes indicate customer payment issues.

probes.name: invoice-reconciliation-drift
probes.description: Checks academorix.invoice.reconcile.drift_detected_total over the last 24h. Any > 0 is a P1 signal — indicates transaction module drift. Warns; the ReconcileInvoicePaymentsJob would emit the metric.

probes.name: invoice-pdf-generation-backlog
probes.description: Warns when > 100 open invoices lack pdf_url for > 30min. Indicates GenerateInvoicePDFJob workers have stalled.

probes.name: invoice-email-delivery-backlog
probes.description: Warns when > 500 open invoices with pdf_url set have not been sent_at for > 1h. Indicates SendInvoiceEmailJob workers have stalled or notifications module is degraded.

probes.name: invoice-dunning-scheduler
probes.description: Confirms invoice-dispatch-dunning ran within the last 25 hours (daily cadence + 1h slop). Stale scheduler indicates dunning has stopped firing.

probes.name: invoice-reconciler-recent
probes.description: Confirms ReconcileInvoicePaymentsJob completed within the last 48 hours. Stale reconciler indicates scheduler drift.

probes.name: invoice-encryption-key-rotated
probes.description: Warns when the SSE-KMS key used for PDF storage has not been rotated in > 90 days. Delegated to the compliance/encryption service's rotation cadence.

probes.name: invoice-tax-integration-healthy
probes.description: Confirms the tax module's TaxResolver is responsive within 500ms. CalculateInvoiceTaxJob depends on this integration.
